song.title: Nothing Without You
song.author: Jeffrey Stephen Norman, Mitch Dane
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 C B V4
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C G Take these hands and lift them up . Am F For I have not the strength to praise You near enough . C G C For I have nothing, I have nothing without You
[V2] Take my voice and pour it out Let it sing the songs of mercy I have found For I have nothing, I have nothing without You
[C] . F C All my soul needs . F Am Is all Your love to cover me . G F C So all the world will see . G C That I have nothing without You
[V3] Take my body and build it up May it be broken as an offering of love For I have nothing, I have nothing without You
[b] . Am G F But I love You . Am G F With all my heart . Am G F With all my soul . Am G Dm With all my mind . G With all the strength that I can find .. .. --- [V4] Take my time here on this earth And let it glorify all that You are worth For I am nothing, I am nothing without You
